remarks: House of Bliss~A rare Connecticut estate where luxury living meets the world's fastest-growing racquet sport. Set on two private acres, House of Bliss is a four-bedroom, five-and-a-half-bath retreat designed for extended stays, executive relocations, family escapes, and padel enthusiasts alike. Its defining feature is something almost never found at a private residence: a regulation 10m x 20m glass-walled padel court, custom-built in 2024 with premium artificial turf, tempered glass walls, and shaded Adirondack seating overlooking the surrounding lawn. Beyond the court, every detail has been curated for effortless living. A heated saltwater pool anchors the outdoor experience, accompanied by a newly designed patio, expansive deck, gas grill, teak dining table, and low-smoke fire pit. The manicured grounds offer ample space for bocce, spike ball, or simply enjoying the quiet beauty of the Connecticut countryside. Inside, the home centers around a spectacular chef's kitchen featuring a grand marble island, professional-grade appliances, and walls of windows that fill the space with natural light. The kitchen flows seamlessly into a soaring great room with vaulted beamed ceilings and a dramatic stone fireplace-the perfect setting for long breakfasts, memorable dinners, and evenings spent together.
